title: Risk and Prognostic Factors in Very Old Patients with Sepsis Secondary to Community-Acquired Pneumonia
study_design: Retrospective observational study of prospectively collected data

sample_size.source_quote: The study population therefore comprised 1238 very old patients with CAP.

mortality_predictors.outcome_definition: Sepsis (Sepsis-3 criteria: presence of pneumonia and SOFA score increase ≥2 points)
mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: Gender, smoking status, alcohol consumption, influenza vaccine, pneumococcal vaccine, previous inhaled corticosteroids, previous systemic corticosteroids, previous antibiotic in last week, chronic pulmonary disease, chronic cardiovascular disease, chronic renal disease, chronic liver disease, diabetes mellitus, chronic neurologic disease, nursing home residency

mortality_predictors.outcome_definition: Sepsis (Sepsis-3 criteria: presence of pneumonia and SOFA score increase ≥2 points)
mortality_predictors.timing: Within one week before hospital admission
mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: Gender, smoking status, alcohol consumption, influenza vaccine, pneumococcal vaccine, previous inhaled corticosteroids, previous systemic corticosteroids, previous antibiotic in last week, chronic pulmonary disease, chronic cardiovascular disease, chronic renal disease, chronic liver disease, diabetes mellitus, chronic neurologic disease, nursing home residency
mortality_predictors.source_quote: Previous antibiotic in last week 0.70 0.53 to 0.92 0.010 0.71 0.54 to 0.94 0.016

mortality_predictors.outcome_definition: Sepsis (Sepsis-3 criteria: presence of pneumonia and SOFA score increase ≥2 points)
mortality_predictors.source_quote: The area under the ROC curve was 0.62 (95% CI 0.59 to 0.65) for the predictive model of sepsis.

mortality_predictors.outcome_definition: 30-day mortality in patients with CAP-related sepsis
mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: Gender, smoking status, alcohol consumption, influenza vaccine, pneumococcal vaccine, previous inhaled corticosteroids, previous systemic corticosteroids, previous antibiotic in last week, chronic pulmonary disease, chronic cardiovascular disease, chronic renal disease, chronic liver disease, diabetes mellitus, neurological disease, nursing home residency, PSI risk class, C-reactive protein, lymphocytes, empiric antibiotic treatment, appropriate empiric antibiotic treatment; propensity score weighting

mortality_predictors.source_quote: The area under the ROC curve was 0.71 (95% CI 0.65–0.78) for the multivariable model of 30-day mortality.
